basic_details.job_title: Meghalaya High Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Computer Operator and Typist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Meghalaya High Court Computer Operator and Typist Notification 2026 has been released on 3 July 2026 on the official website of the Meghalaya High Court. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced through the Meghalaya High Court Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree with Diploma/Certificate in Computers or Typing, 5 years experience as Grade IV employee in Meghalaya High Court.
qualification.details: Computer Operator: Bachelor Degree from a recognised University with diploma/Certificate in Computers; 5 years' experience as a Grade IV employee in the High Court of Meghalaya. Typist: Bachelor Degree from a recognized University with Diploma/Certificate in Typing; 5 years' experience as a Grade IV employee in the High Court of Meghalaya.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level - 7 (Rs 28,400/-) for Computer Operator, Level - 4 (Rs 22,200/-) for Typist

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Meghalaya High Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Meghalaya High Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Meghalaya High Court Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Meghalaya High Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

Meghalaya High Court Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Computer Operator: Bachelor Degree from a recognised University with diploma/Certificate in Computers; 5 years' experience as a Grade IV employee in the High Court of Meghalaya. Typist: Bachelor Degree from a recognized University with Diploma/Certificate in Typing; 5 years' experience as a Grade IV employee in the High Court of Meghalaya.

content_sections.heading: Meghalaya High Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Meghalaya High Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Meghalaya High Court recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Meghalaya High Court Computer Operator and Typist posts is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: For the Computer Operator post, a Bachelor's Degree with a diploma/certificate in Computers and 5 years of experience as a Grade IV employee in the Meghalaya High Court is required. For the Typist post, a Bachelor's Degree with a diploma/certificate in Typing and similar experience is needed.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by the Meghalaya High Court for the posts of Computer Operator and Typist.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by the Meghalaya High Court.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected Computer Operator will receive a salary as per Level - 7 (Rs 28,400/-), and the selected Typist will receive a salary as per Level - 4 (Rs 22,200/-).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Meghalaya High Court recruitment includes a Qualifying Test and Promotion.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Meghalaya High Court recruitment is HCM.II/290/2013-Estt/63.

faq.question: Q10. Does the Meghalaya High Court offer age relaxation?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.
